creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #7)

> Did the clang++ involved have assertions enabled? …

I don't know, sorry. Re: <https://www.freshports.org/www/ladybird/#packages> I wondered why it's not packaged, I saw the line in the Makefile with reference to this bug, I simply commented out the line to tell whether it builds. 

Probably built whilst CURRENT was running with GENERIC-NODEBUG, if that's relevant.
